title: Production DarkRP shop NPC
prompt:
Make a DarkRP shop NPC that players can use to buy items.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: server-authoritative, proximity-bound shop session with early per-player network throttling, compact item IDs, targeted networking, validated DarkRP purchase order, and lifecycle cleanup
